theme_and_archetype.vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, premium. High-end e-commerce with a brutalist yet elegant edge.

colors.guidelines: No muddy greys. High contrast. Accent color #002FA7 used sparingly for non-primary active states or highlights. Primary CTA buttons must be solid #000000 with #FFFFFF text.

typography.heading_strategy: Radical weight contrast. Headings are 'font-black' (900), body is 'font-light' (300). Tracking-tight on all headers above text-2xl.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-8 to p-16 for main sections. p-6 internal for cards.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Homepage. Asymmetric col spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4). Mode B for Dashboard/Account sections (strict, dense, functional).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all dense content, forms, and product details. Hero text can be left-aligned within a wide container.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5 shadow-sm. z-50 sticky top-0.
surface_strategies.cards_products: Flat solid background. 1px border-gray-200. NO SHADOW. Hover: border-gray-900.
surface_strategies.footer: Dark mode flip: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white. py-24. Massive logo type text-[10vw] at the bottom.

motion_and_interaction.buttons: hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors duration-200. Focus: ring-2 ring-black ring-offset-2.

icons.usage: Use Phophor icons with weight='regular' for UI elements, weight='duotone' for marketing sections.

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Raw HTML/Tailwind for Hero, Grids, and Category layouts. No Shadcn wrappers to allow extreme asymmetry.
components_strategy.interactive_logic: Shadcn UI for Dialogs, Select, Checkbox, Tabs. Strip default Vercel styles and match Swiss Brutalist look.
components_strategy.forms: Strict Shadcn forms with square borders (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).

hero_background.description: Minimalist white architectural interior, used as the background image for the main hero section. Put a bg-white/40 overlay to ensure text is readable.

product_1.description: White cream jar with gold accents. Use in product listing grid.

product_2.description: Pair of earrings on a bowl. Use in product listing grid.

category_fashion_1.description: Woman in white dress. Use for 'Women's Fashion' category card.

category_fashion_2.description: Makeup artist. Use for 'Beauty' or 'Accessories' category card.

partner_logo.description: Rivian logo on building. Use as a placeholder for partner brands in a 'Brands we carry' marquee.

testing_requirements: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. E.g., data-testid='checkout-submit-button'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON thoroughly. The archetype is 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Your primary layout strategy should be large typographic headers paired with dense, structured grids.
Do not invent new colors. Stick strictly to the monochrome palette defined, using #002FA7 only for subtle accents if absolutely necessary.
Implement the home page using custom CSS/HTML with Tailwind. Use Shadcn strictly for interactive pieces like dialogs, forms, dropdowns.
The Hero Section must have the architectural image overlaid with bg-white/40, making the h1 pop in stark black.
Add data-testid to every button, link, and form input without fail.
For product cards, use the Tetris Grid for variations in size. Do not use equal sized cards everywhere.
Implement a marquee using react-fast-marquee with 'Brands we carry' using pure text and the partner logo provided.
